injuryUpdates.injuryType: Medial collateral ligament (MCL) knee injury, no surgery required
injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Targeting start of Arsenal pre-season; unlikely fit for the tournament

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Forced off in first half after challenge by Crysencio Summerville

injuryUpdates.source: Sky Sports, ESPN, Fox Sports - May 13, 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Significant MCL damage rules him out for the rest of Arsenal's season including the Champions League final. Recovery timeline of at least four to eight weeks puts him out of contention for selection on May 22. Tuchel reportedly unlikely to risk him.

injuryUpdates.injuryType: Thigh complaint (fourth injury of the season)
injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Will not feature again for Newcastle this season; expected available for tournament selection

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Picked up thigh issue in 2-1 home defeat

injuryUpdates.source: ESPN, GB News, Washington Post, theScore - Apr 24-29, 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Versatile defender able to cover both flanks. Not considered serious but Newcastle will not risk him. Race against time to prove fitness before May 22 squad announcement; selection in jeopardy given recurring fitness concerns.

injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: N/A - back to full match action

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Scored - first goal since January 20, ending four-month drought

injuryUpdates.source: Sports Illustrated, Fox Sports, ESPN - May 14-15, 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Recovery from February hamstring tear now complete. Made return cameo in early April and has built up to full minutes by mid-May, capped by goal against Real Oviedo. Expected to be a guaranteed starter in Tuchel's 26-man squad announced May 22.

injuryUpdates.injuryType: Recovered from ankle/muscle strain (March friendly vs Uruguay)

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Returned to Man City action in April after recovering from England friendly knock

injuryUpdates.source: Sky Sports, ESPN, Sports Mole, Fox Sports - Apr-May 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Injury proved less serious than first feared. Returned for Manchester City in April and is back in Tuchel's plans, recalled to recent England squad. Expected to feature in the May 22 26-man selection.

injuryUpdates.injuryType: Recovering from hamstring injury (10th of career)
injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Targeted return before Chelsea's season ends May 24

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Last match before 10th career hamstring injury

injuryUpdates.source: Fox Sports, Sports Mole, GiveMeSport - Apr-May 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Recovery reportedly on track and not in danger of missing the tournament per latest reports. Tuchel has confirmed James is his first-choice right-back when fit. Needs to prove fitness in remaining Chelsea fixtures before May 22 squad announcement.

injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Under assessment ahead of May 22 selection

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Last match before knee issue emerged

injuryUpdates.source: Chelsea FC, Sky Sports - Mar 2026 (no fresh update found in last 30 days)
injuryUpdates.notes: No material new reporting on his status since the original injury entry. Carrying forward existing assessment; competition for attacking spots intensifying with Welbeck recall and others.

squadChanges.details: Brighton forward, 35, recalled to the provisional 55-man list after last appearing for England in 2018. Earned recall on the back of 13 Premier League goals this season.
Real Madrid defender recalled to the provisional list after being omitted from the March squad. Right-back options thinned by Ben White and Tino Livramento injuries reopened the door.
Manchester United left-back included in provisional 55 despite ongoing fitness concerns; Tuchel values his tactical understanding at left-back.
Everton centre-back included in provisional 55 to add defensive depth; needs to prove fitness after a disrupted club season.
Bournemouth midfielder named in the provisional 55 ahead of the May 22 final squad announcement.

bettingOddsUpdate.source: Aggregated from Oddschecker, FanDuel, Fox Sports, Lineups, RotoWire - May 2026
bettingOddsUpdate.notes: England consistently priced third-favourite at +550 to +650 behind Spain (around +450) and France (around +500). To win Group L priced around 1/4 (-400) by major UK books; no consensus group-stage exit price found from a reputable aggregator.

summary: Major defensive blow as Arsenal's Ben White suffered a serious MCL knee injury on May 11 that almost certainly rules him out of the tournament, and Newcastle's Tino Livramento has also picked up a season-ending thigh problem. Counter-balanced by good news: Jude Bellingham has fully recovered from his hamstring tear and scored for Real Madrid on May 14, while Phil Foden is back in Tuchel's plans. Tuchel submitted his provisional 55-man squad on May 11 with eye-catching recalls for Danny Welbeck, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Luke Shaw, Jarrad Branthwaite and Alex Scott ahead of the final 26-man selection on May 22.
